response.justification: Bogdan has highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly matching the AI-driven environment of the role. He brings deep polyglot engineering experience and has built high-throughput microservices. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his strong TypeScript skills, architectural background, and direct exposure to agentic workflows make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Proven background in high-throughput, distributed systems, including handling millions of requests per second.
Strong architectural and operational mindset with extensive polyglot, DevOps, and CI/CD experience.
concerns: Lacks the 'Strong Python' experience explicitly listed as a must-have in the job description.
A history of relatively short tenures across several roles may raise questions about long-term strategic ownership.
Much of his deep systems programming experience is in niche languages like DLang rather than mainstream enterprise languages.
